rubric_text: In file `audit_log.xlsx` in folder `Rodriguez_07221975`, there must be exactly 2 rows of data (excluding headers).
In `slack_data.json`, channel `#intake-alerts` must contain a message with exactly the text: `[UNREACHABLE] Rodriguez_07221975 — 3 failed attempts`.
In mailbox.json, there must be a sent email to `rcho@greenmedclinic.org` with subject `Unable to Contact Patient  | CASE_ID: Rodriguez_07221975` and sign-off by `Jake Morrow`.
In file `intake.xlsx` in folder `Webb_03151968`, row 2 must contain `Gammagard Liquid 10%` in column `Drug_Name` and `35` in column `Drug_Dose_Grams`
In file `auth.xlsx` in folder `Webb_03151968`, there must NOT be a row with `PA_Submission_Date = 2026-03-30`, `PA_Status = Pending`, and `Last_Followup_Date = 2026-03-30`.
In `slack_data.json`, channel `#intake-team` must NOT contain a message with text `[PA SUBMITTED] Webb_03151968
In `mailbox.json`, there must NOT be a sent email to `pa.submissions@bcpremier.com`.
In `slack_data.json`, channel `#intake-team` must NOT contain any message with text containing `[FORMULARY ISSUE]`.
In file `audit_log.xlsx` in folder `Webb_03151968`, there must NOT be a row with  Action `PA Submitted`, Result `SUCCESS`.

In file `audit_log.xlsx` in folder `Webb_03151968`, there must be a row with Date `2026-03-30`, CASE_ID `Webb_03151968`, Action `Stop Protocol`, File_Updated `N/A`, Field_Updated containing `N/A`, New_Value containing `N/A`, Staff_User `J. Morrow`, Result `STOP - invalid file`.
In the file `intake.xlsx` in the folder `Webb_03151968`, row 2 must NOT contain `Octagam` in the `Drug_Name` column or `40` in the `Drug_Dose_Grams` column.
In slack_data.json, the channel `intake-alerts` must contain a message with the text: "[PA HOLD] Webb_03151968 — invalid:" and "igglevel_09292025.pdf" or "Most recent IgG lab result"
In `mailbox.json`, there must be exactly 1 email in the Sent folder.
In the file `audit_log.xlsx` in folder `Webb_03151968`, there must be exactly 4 rows of data (excluding headers).
In the workspace, there must be a folder titled `Webb_03151968`.
In the workspace, there must be a folder titled `Rodriguez_07221975`.

In mailbox.json, the body with the sent email subject `Unable to Contact Patient  | CASE_ID: Rodriguez_07221975` must contain the following in the same order: `Dear Dr. Robert Cho,` or `Dear Dr. Cho,` `We received a referral for Carmen Rodriguez (DOB: 07221975).`, `After 3 contact attempts, we have been unable to reach the patient`, `at the number on file: (555) 618-9043.`, `Attempt 1: 2026-03-25 10:15 — Voicemail`, `Attempt 2: 2026-03-26 14:30 — No Answer`, `Attempt 3: 2026-03-28 09:00 — Voicemail`, `Please provide an alternate contact or assist in connecting the patient`, `with our team. We cannot proceed until contact is established.`
